commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=78040de2aa11ca19cd84153b8995cf497826b2fd)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Workboard review-submission tool, gates `workboard_complete` on review-related state/proof, and adds a `ready_to_merge` card status.

PR surface: Source +166. Total +166 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of the PR head shows a no-proof `running` card can still complete, and current Workboard metadata/status consumers omit the new tool/status declarations; I did not run tests because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] This needs contributor real behavior proof and maintainer review of the new persisted status and fail-closed lifecycle before any merge path; automation cannot supply the contributor's real setup proof.

target.title: feat(workboard): review gate hard blocks + workboard_submit_review tool
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Agents can call workboard_complete on any card at any time, bypassing the mandatory review gate. This happened in production — cards were marked done without any reviewer session running. The tool layer had no enforcement.

## Evidence

- Two cards in the AGENTerprise OS pipeline were marked done without review (protocol violation logs)
- TypeScript compilation passes locally (0 new errors)

## What This Changes

Enforces Stage 4 REVIEW GATE at the tool level.

### 1. workboard_complete hard blocks
Rejects completion if card status is not review/ready_to_merge/running, or if proof exists but no passed review.

### 2. New tool: workboard_submit_review
Structured review verdict (approved/changes_requested/blocked), 6 check dimensions, auto-moves card, escalates after 3 failed rounds.

### 3. New status: ready_to_merge
Added to WORKBOARD_STATUSES.

Files: extensions/workboard/src/tools.ts, extensions/workboard/src/types.ts
target.author: rizwan-saddal

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
